title: Magic Eight Cube
description: Its magic eight ball in minecraft except its a cube
body:
V2.0.0 for minecraft 1.21.4 brings new custom magic eight cube variants that can be created through datapacks

Shown here [Magic Eight Cube Variants](https://codersdownunder.net/docs/magiceightcube/variants)

 

Legacy
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>


As of V1.1.0 there is a new customizable Magic Eight Cube ("custom messages can be added in the config file") and is crafted with a piece of stone instead of cobblestone.



It adds a magic eight cube(ball) for fortune telling or making decisions its up to you.



 i know its not much of a description but that's really all there is to it.



Credits:

ryancr5 - For the new magic eight cube texture version 1.0.2 and up



Recipe

![Recipe](https://imgur.com/y2GbTf6.png)


</details>
